duplicateRisks.overlapDescription: Both cover foraging for edible plants in emergencies. 'foraging' is a stub reference_guide while 'edible-plant-foraging-basics' is a full scenario_guide with 10 steps and 9 source references.
duplicateRisks.recommendation: Upgrade 'foraging' to be a reference companion to 'edible-plant-foraging-basics' — focus on identification reference material (plant families, universal edibility test) rather than step-by-step foraging procedure. Keep scopes distinct to avoid overlap.
